narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 4,985 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
